name: NMPA (National Medical Products Administration)
shortDescription: China's central drug regulator (renamed from CFDA in 2018, originally SFDA in 2003); approves drugs, devices, vaccines
signature: Owns the post-2015 approval reform program (Order 117/722, ICH membership, conditional approval, value-oriented oncology guideline)

name: NHSA (National Healthcare Security Administration)
shortDescription: Single national payer; runs NRDL annual price negotiations and Volume-Based Procurement

name: NDRC (National Development and Reform Commission)
nameZh: 国家发展和改革委员会
shortDescription: Industrial planning and macroeconomic policy; sets biotech as strategic emerging industry

name: MoST (Ministry of Science and Technology)
nameZh: 中华人民共和国科学技术部
shortDescription: Science policy and major R&D funding programs (863, 973, Major New Drug Project)

name: CDE (Center for Drug Evaluation)
nameZh: 国家药品监督管理局药品审评中心
shortDescription: NMPA's technical review arm; performs the substantive science assessments behind approval decisions

name: NHC (National Health Commission)
shortDescription: National health authority; pandemic response, public health policy, hospital regulation

name: FDA (US Food and Drug Administration)
shortDescription: US drug regulator; approves Chinese-discovered drugs that go global (Brukinsa, Carvykti, etc.)
signature: Brukinsa accelerated approval (Nov 2019) — first Chinese-discovered drug FDA approval

name: EMA (European Medicines Agency)
shortDescription: EU drug regulator; approves Chinese-discovered drugs for European market

name: ICH (International Council for Harmonisation)
shortDescription: Harmonizes pharmaceutical standards across US, EU, Japan, China; China joined as Regulatory Member June 2017
signature: China membership unlocked bridging trials and global pipeline alignment

name: US Congress
shortDescription: Passes laws affecting US-China biotech relations including BIOSECURE Act
signature: BIOSECURE Act enacted Dec 2025 as Section 851 of FY2026 NDAA

name: WHO (World Health Organization)
shortDescription: UN health agency; vaccine prequalification gates Chinese vaccine exports to LMICs
signature: Sinovac and Sinopharm Emergency Use Listings (2021)
